title: What sanctions are actually designed to do - Sarah Paine
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Sarah Paine on the actual purposes and mechanisms of economic sanctions. The discussion examines what sanctions are fundamentally designed to achieve rather than their stated public rationales.
